name: Robot Workspace Envelope Characterization
description: A robotics engineer must characterize the full reachable workspace envelope of a simulated robot arm in CoppeliaSim to validate that it satisfies a new production cell layout requirement. Document at least 50 distinct joint configurations and their corresponding end-effector positions. Save the per-configuration records to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/workspace_samples.csv and the aggregate workspace statistics to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/workspace_report.json. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
